A|Hi everyone, thanks for joining. Bob, you wanted to walk us through the architecture?
B|Yes Alice. I have three diagrams. The first one shows the data ingestion layer.
C|Before you start Bob, could you remind me which database we ended up choosing?
B|We picked Postgres for the primary store, Carol. Redis only for caching.
C|Right, thanks. Go ahead.
B|So ingestion runs through a queue. Each event is durable for thirty days.
A|Carol, does that retention window meet the compliance requirements you flagged?
C|Thirty days is the minimum. I would prefer sixty, but thirty is acceptable.
A|Okay, let us note that as a follow-up. Bob, what about the processing layer?
B|There are two stages. Validation first, then enrichment with external data.
C|Who owns the enrichment pipeline?
B|My team for now. We can hand it off once it stabilizes.
A|Great. Let us move to the API design next.
